title: Rubber Defies Lightning
description: Luffy returns to the final battle against Enel, refusing to let the self-proclaimed god erase Skypiea or the old promise.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this scene focuses on Conis, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Calgara. Luffy returns to the final battle against Enel, refusing to let the self-proclaimed god erase Skypiea or the old promise.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And that is the giant golden bell!

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: And Emel is really flying towards it...?

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: See the giant stalk over there...

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Just how can he run so fast....!?

summary: Luffy returns to the final battle against Enel, refusing to let the self-proclaimed god erase Skypiea or the old promise.
